textPlain: In addition to what's already in the thread, I assume by now somebody has vibecoded an agent to scan GitHub for bounties and then automatically vibe up a corresponding solution. Will be a fun source of spam for anyone who wants to do the right thing and pay people for good work.
> Please only apply if you have taken time to explore the Importer codebase, as well as the Notion API.Suddenly 5k$ does not sound as good
